narrative:
Chardon municipal court district has 66,686 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -6.8% D−R vs -23.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
